title: JWT token doesn't contain subscription claim on trial period

posts.author: DKostochko (Dima Kostochko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

An app tries to get a subscription info from JWT token in a webhook. But JWT token doesn’t contain the subscription claim in the app trial period.

For example the subscription appeared only after trial period had been extended.

Is there any way to get info about trial period in the app?
Or did I miss something?

Dmitry
